discovery_domain: hard-frontier minimal witness-language phase diagram over the v38 refill feature surface

families.contract: exact score-local positive-cover plus residual-default witnesses on each nontrivial score block
families.cost_metric: total positive witness count across nontrivial score blocks

families.contract: exact merged-region positive-cover plus residual-default witnesses on the best exact score partition
families.cost_metric: total positive witness count across exact merged regions

families.contract: exact shared witness-schema library over the best exact merged-region partition

holdout_domain: the same 13 holdout fact states used from v29 through v46

strict_cost_ladder.cost_metric: total positive witness count across nontrivial score blocks
total positive witness count across exact merged regions

strongest_claim: On the hard refill witness frontier, minimal witness-language discovery yields a strict bounded ladder once the witness contract is widened. Exact score-local residual-default witnesses cost 27, exact merged-region residual-default witnesses cost 22 on partition `(7), (8), (9), (10,11), (12)`, and the best exact shared witness-schema library over that same partition has size 19. Local all-positive witnesses already fail on scores 9 and 10. So the harder frontier does not merely tie several exact families. It orders them.
